title: Ryanair Announces Expansion at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The expansion of Ryanair's operations at Prestwick Airport marks a significant milestone for the airline and the region. With the introduction of additional jobs, the initiative is anticipated to boost employment opportunities and contribute to the economic growth of South Ayrshire.

sourceReferences.citationText: scotsman-news – Ryanair announces 450 jobs in Prestwick Airport aircraft maintenance base expansion
